name: Ann Arbor Indoor Golf
about: Ann Arbor Indoor Golf provides a comprehensive golf simulator experience focused on play, learning, and training. The facility features industry-leading overhead camera technology, including the Uneekor Optix launch monitor, which provides real-time data and video analysis of each shot. A wide selection of world-renowned courses like Augusta National and Pebble Beach, as well as popular local courses such as Arcadia Bluffs, are available for play. The venue offers multiple rate options, including flat hourly, frequent player, and group/league rates, accessible through an online booking system.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced Uneekor Optix overhead camera technology for highly accurate shot data and impact video
Access to thousands of courses, including premier world-famous and top local destinations
Professional coaching programs for all skill levels, from beginners to competitive athletes
A stress-free, welcoming environment ideal for learning and improving your game
In-depth swing and shot analysis tools to train and take your game to the next level

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of an on-site kitchen or food service
No mention of an on-site bar or alcohol service

simulator_hardware.notes: Overhead hi-speed camera-based launch monitor providing validated photographic technology of club impact and ball spin

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf clubs to use on the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention a policy on outside food or drinks. It's best to contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify an average time for completing 18 holes. The duration can vary based on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers coaching certified by U.S. Kids Golf and is described as a fun, stress-free environment for beginners to learn, making it suitable for juniors and youth.
